title: Dense Ores: Refabricated
description: Adds dense versions of all vanilla ores
body:
Dense Ores: Refabricated is a port of rwtema's original Dense Ores mod. Dense Ores are a special, rare ore variant that'll guarantee you 3x the ores when mined. They'll randomly generated alongside regular ores in ore veins.

Features:

- All 8 overworld ores in dense forms;

- Deepslate variants;

- Nether Dense Ores;
- Customizable generation via config.
